UD JURY TRIALS

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Josh Pebet.
Attorney David Wasserman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marcio Joelson Cunha is present.
Attorney Skye D.Y. Longs appearing for the defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of JUL-06-2015 is vacated. (501/JPT)
